title: ProgramApplication
description: An application to enroll in a DYCD program (e.g. a Summer Youth Employment Program (SYEP) application, or a COMPASS/Beacon after-school registration). NET-NEW: there is NO public API and NO Open Data twin for applying to a DYCD program; today applications happen only through DYCD's seasonal online application flow and the DYCD Connect / DiscoverDYCD apps. This schema serves both the read surface (check an applicant's own application status) and the write surface (apply / submit).

applicationId.description: Server-assigned application/confirmation number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Application lifecycle status. Set by DYCD/provider, not the applicant.

programName.description: The program being applied to (e.g. 'Summer Youth Employment Program').

programSiteName.description: Preferred program site, if the applicant selects one.

fiscalYear.description: Program year / season being applied for.

guardian.description: Parent/guardian for applicants who are minors.

nychaResident.description: Whether the applicant lives in NYCHA public housing (relevant to Local Law 163 SYEP set-asides).
